change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
A description of the main activities of the project 
3.1  Lead DP working Group and provide technical inputs & capacity building to NSC SP to finalize national social protection framework
3.2  Support for Joint Review, assessment of child grant and revision of guidelines
3.3  Provide technical inputs and support Parliamentary Forum to ensure full incorporation of women and children’s rights in drafting & adopting Constitution
3.4  Facilitate,support and provide technical inputs into preparation and submission of CRC, CEDAW reports
3.5  Develop child friendly version of child poverty study and conduct social budget study
3.6 Monitoring and Supervision

snapshot.implementing_agency: Dang District Development Committee, Kalikot District Development Committee, Dadeldhura District Development Committee, Jajarkot District Development Committee, Kavrepalanchowk District Development Committee, Kapilvastu District Development Committee, Parsa District Development Committee, Bajura District Development Committee, Nawalparasi District Development Committee, Tanahun District Development Committee, Sunsari District Development Committee, Consortium of Organisation Working for Child Participation, Mugu District Development Committee, Children as Zone of Peace, Dolpa District Development Committee, Accham District Development Committee, Chitwan District Development Committee, Ministry of Women, Children and Senior Citizens, Saptari District Development Committee, Rukum District Development Committee, Jumla District Development Committee, Child Rights Parliamentary Forum, Udayapur District Development Committee, National Planning Commission, Humla District Development Committee, Bajhang District Development Committee, Kaski District Development Committee, Ministry of Federal Affairs & General Administration, Panchthar District Development Committee

en.full: PCR5, IR-3: Legislation, social protection, social budgeting, child poverty
